findings.detail: A public open source release needs an explicit top-level license file.
findings.remediation: Add a LICENSE file and align package metadata with it.
findings.title: Project license is missing

findings.detail: A public release should preserve third-party notices and attribution requirements where applicable.
findings.remediation: Add NOTICE or THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md after reviewing dependency licenses.
findings.title: Third-party notices are missing

findings.detail: .env commonly contains credentials and should not be published.
findings.remediation: Remove it from git, rotate exposed credentials if needed, and keep an example file instead.
findings.title: Potential secret-bearing file is present

findings.detail: Found potential hardcoded secret on line 1: sk-ant-api03--FZTqRbJfIYiNfl2tUSwm6ye9dG...[truncated]
findings.remediation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use environment variables, secret management systems, or configuration files (excluded from git).
findings.title: Hardcoded Anthropic API key detected

findings.detail: Found potential hardcoded secret on line 84: Bearer tokens
findings.remediation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use environment variables, secret management systems, or configuration files (excluded from git).
findings.title: Hardcoded Bearer token detected

findings.detail: Source text references a known provider, environment variable, or tool name.
findings.remediation: Confirm applicable provider terms, data handling, examples, and publication requirements.
findings.title: OpenAI usage detected outside dependency manifests

findings.detail: The project appears to use Anthropic. Review current provider terms before public release.
findings.remediation: Record review owner, date, account type, applicable terms, and any required safeguards in the release decision.
findings.title: Anthropic policy review required

findings.detail: The project appears to use OpenAI. Review current provider terms before public release.
findings.remediation: Record review owner, date, account type, applicable terms, and any required safeguards in the release decision.
findings.title: OpenAI policy review required

findings.detail: 5 provider policy sources are available for snapshot monitoring.
findings.remediation: Run `clearance monitor` before release and on a schedule after publication.
findings.title: Policy monitoring sources configured

policy_sources.name: Terms and policies index
policy_sources.review_note: Review applicable Terms of Use, Service Terms, privacy, publication, and usage policy pages before release.

policy_sources.name: Usage policies
policy_sources.review_note: Confirm the project use case, examples, tests, and documentation do not encourage prohibited or high-risk use without required safeguards.

policy_sources.name: Service terms
policy_sources.review_note: Review API-specific terms, output handling, indemnity exclusions, and third-party offering language.

policy_sources.name: Claude Code data usage
policy_sources.review_note: Confirm account type, telemetry, bug reporting, data retention, and model training settings before publishing code or examples.

policy_sources.name: Usage policy update
policy_sources.review_note: Use as a pointer to current Anthropic usage policy expectations, especially agentic, cybersecurity, and high-risk use cases.
